name: bug-echo
description: After you fix a bug, find other instances of the same pattern in the codebase. The third stage of the post-fix sweep workflow.

plugins.name: bug-echo
plugins.description: After fixing a bug, finds and rates other instances of the same anti-pattern. Self-validates the constructed pattern against the pre-fix file before scanning. Each match is classified individually as BUG / OK / REVIEW.
